indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of any desk or table at sitting height is the primary barrier to setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: upholstered restaurant seating without desk
indicators.rationale: Soft lounging seating without an adjacent surface forces an uncomfortable, non-ergonomic posture for laptop use.

indicators.name: high-traffic restaurant layout
indicators.rationale: Restaurant layout is a high-distraction, high-foot-traffic public space, strongly incompatible with focused solo knowledge work.

indicators.name: ambient restaurant lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting provides no task illumination for screen work and may cause screen glare.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is fundamentally unsuitable for focused solo computer work. The lack of any desk surface, combined with the high-traffic restaurant layout and ambient-only lighting, prevents productive workstation setup. A laptop could technically be balanced on one's lap on the sofa, preventing a score of 1, but the environment is far from adequate for sustained work.
